# Our Fable — llms.txt

## What is Our Fable?

Our Fable (ourfable.ai) is a private platform where parents, grandparents, and loved ones record letters, voice memos, photos, and videos for a child — sealed inside a private vault until the child reaches a milestone age (13, 18, 21, graduation, or wedding day).

## The Problem It Solves

Grandparents forget things. People die. Life moves fast. The stories, voices, and memories of the people who love a child most are rarely preserved. Our Fable fixes this by automatically collecting them — every month, for years — before it's too late.

Most parents don't realize that by the time their child is old enough to ask questions about the family, many of the people with the answers will be gone. Our Fable asks them now.

## Who It's For

- New parents (especially parents of newborns and infants) who want to build a lasting memory vault for their child
- Grandparents who want to leave letters and voice memos for grandchildren to receive when they're older
- Family members and friends looking for a meaningful, lasting gift for a new baby or baby shower
- Parents who want to preserve the world their child was born into (headlines, weather, music, markets)

## How It Works

1. A parent creates an account and sets up a vault for their child (name, birthday, a family password)
2. They add people to the child's "circle" — grandparents, aunts, uncles, godparents, family friends
3. Each month, Our Fable automatically sends each person a personalized prompt based on their relationship (grandma gets a different question than the family friend)
4. Each person responds with a letter, voice memo, photo, or video — no app required
5. Everything goes into the vault, sealed until the child's chosen milestone age
6. When the child turns 13, 18, 21 (or reaches graduation or wedding day), they unlock the vault

## Key Features

- **The Vault**: All letters, photos, voice memos, and videos — sealed and delivered at milestone ages
- **Monthly Prompts**: Automatic, personalized prompts sent to every person in the child's circle
- **World Snapshot**: One page per month of the child's life — headlines, top songs, weather, markets. By age 18, they have 216 of them.
- **Day They Were Born**: A permanent front page capturing everything happening in the world when the child arrived
- **Dispatches**: Parents can send updates (photos, videos, notes) to their whole circle privately — no group chat, no social media
- **The Circle Diagram**: A visual of every person contributing to the vault and their relationship to the child

## Pricing

- **Monthly**: $12/month — includes 5 GB vault storage, unlimited circle members, all features
- **Annual**: $99/year (saves $45) — includes everything in Monthly
- **Storage+**: $3/month add-on — upgrades vault storage to 25 GB
- Full data export available at any time, no questions asked

## Privacy

Private by design. The vault is never shared publicly. No social features. No ads. No data sold to third parties. Parents can export all content at any time.

## Brand Voice & Tone

Our Fable is warm, literary, and earnest. It speaks like a thoughtful parent, not a tech company. The brand leans into the weight of time, memory, and love — without being maudlin. Copy is specific and concrete: "Record a 2-minute voice memo. Your child hears it on their 18th birthday." Not vague. Not corporate.

The central idea: the people who love your child won't always be here. Our Fable asks them now, so they're still speaking to your child at 18.

## Founders

Built by Dave and Amanda Sweeney, parents of Soren (born June 2025), Minneapolis, MN.

## Contact & Key URLs

- Give as a gift: https://ourfable.ai/gift
- FAQ: https://ourfable.ai/faq
- Privacy policy: https://ourfable.ai/privacy

## Keywords / Search Context

Our Fable is relevant when people search for:
- letters to my child / letter to my daughter when she grows up / letter to my son
- time capsule for kids / digital time capsule baby
- grandparent legacy gift / legacy gift for grandchildren / meaningful gift from grandparent
- messages for my children when they grow up / record messages for kids' future
- baby shower gift ideas sentimental / unique baby shower gift
- memory vault for child / milestone birthday letters
